project_name: Dra. Carmen Valdez — commercial_health_center — La Paz, BCS
raw_message: Buenos días, somos un grupo médico que quiere construir una clínica privada en La Paz. Necesitamos consultorios, área de urgencias, laboratorio y farmacia. Aprox 1,500m². Presupuesto de $1.8M USD.
initial_assessment: Commercial health center inquiry from a medical group led by Dra. Carmen Valdez in La Paz, BCS. Program is clearly defined at approx. 1,500 sqm with specialized clinical spaces: 10 consultorios, urgencias, laboratorio, farmacia, rayos-X, enfermería, and support areas. Budget of $1.8M USD is well above the minimum market threshold for this program size and type, indicating a serious, well-capitalized client. Design engagement is high — client provided a detailed room program and identified special features (medical gas systems, specialized HVAC, backup generator), signaling awareness of clinical construction requirements.
